name: @console-stream-mcp/browser-extension
description: Chromium extension that captures browser runtime events and streams them to a local console-stream-mcp server

scripts.build: tsup src/background.ts src/content-script.ts src/injected.ts src/popup.ts src/options.ts --format iife --target es2020 --clean --legacy-output && node -e "for (const f of ['manifest.json','popup.html','options.html']) require('fs').copyFileSync(f, 'dist/'+f)"
